purpose: Convert outfit reference images into clean attached-head creature outfit renders that preserve the Dog Leg skeleton pose, digitigrade legs, closed hand alignment, optional tail range, and user-specified creature identity.

referenceImages.description: Authoritative front pose, arm angle, closed hand grouping, digitigrade leg spacing, and full-body framing reference.
Authoritative profile silhouette for forward head posture, hunched upper body, digitigrade leg curve, paw angle, and tail root.
Authoritative three-quarter creature volume, attached head, long arms, closed fingers, and dog-leg lower-body reference.
Authoritative rear pose, widened arm spacing, close leg spacing, rear body scale, back silhouette, and rear full-body framing reference.
Maximum dog-leg skeleton tail length and extension reference for tailed creature outputs.

front.label: Dog Leg Creature Front
front.description: Front-facing creature outfit render on the Dog Leg skeleton pose.

back.label: Dog Leg Creature Back
back.description: Direct rear view continuing the same Dog Leg creature outfit from the approved front view.

side.label: Dog Leg Creature Side
side.description: Direct profile side view continuing the same Dog Leg creature outfit, with full tail documentation when enabled.
